summary: Added the first source-backed runtime summary slice. The CLI now supports summarize-runtime, which reads one declared runtime launch plan and one declared runtime result, verifies that they describe the same bounded executor chain, and writes one validated .specbridge/runtime-summaries/*.runtime-summary.json artifact with validation totals, policy result, merge readiness, blockers, and source files.
policy_result: Passed. The task stayed inside the issue 067 contract and scope manifest. The new command reads one declared runtime launch plan and one declared runtime result, rejects mismatched launch/result chains, writes one declared runtime summary artifact, and records evidence-only execution policy booleans.
risk_result: Medium risk because runtime summaries may be used by later audit and merge gates. Risk is controlled by file-only evidence summarization, no live executor launch, no shell execution by the command, no dependency installation, no secrets, no production configuration, no authentication or authorization changes, no billing changes, no CI/CD weakening, and no deployment.
unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending until the branch is pushed and checks run.
Runtime summaries link existing launch and result evidence; a future contract is still required for a fresh executor source run that creates new bounded executor output.
merge_status: Pending pull request, GitHub CI, and required merge gates.
